description_long: This is a classic football with a traditional black-and-white pattern, featuring pentagonal and hexagonal panels arranged in a spherical shape. The surface shows visible scuff marks and light scratches, indicating it has been used but is still in good condition. The panels are likely made of synthetic leather, stitched together to form a durable and slightly textured exterior. The seams between the panels are slightly raised, and the ball appears to be well-inflated, maintaining a round and even shape. The black pentagons contrast sharply with the white hexagons, creating the iconic look associated with association football. No visible branding or league logos are present on the surface.
description: A classic black-and-white football with visible scuff marks and a traditional panel pattern, showing signs of light use.
description_view_0: The football is seen with a mix of black pentagons and white hexagons, with scuff marks visible on the white panels.
description_view_1: This view centers a black pentagonal panel, highlighting the textured surface and the stitching around the edges.
description_view_2: The football is shown at an angle, emphasizing the curvature and the distribution of the black and white panels.
description_view_3: A mostly white-panel view with black pentagons at the edges, showing the wear and surface texture clearly.
